<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band11_chunk006.pdf#page=14 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band11 p276 -->

LANDKREIS EBERSBERG · ALTENBURG

<!-- header: LANDKREIS EBERSBERG · ALTENBURG -->


[[File:Band11_chunk006_p014_img001.jpg|thumb|Krönung Mariens, Ausschnitt aus Fresko B]]



[[File:Band11_chunk006_p014_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band11 p277 -->
